omitted_declarations.policy_reference: While you are present at facilities, games or events operated or controlled by MLB, an MLB Club, an MiLB Club, or an MLB Entity, there may be video recording, including but not limited to for telecast, security, marketing, promotional or other purposes. The terms and conditions applicable to your access to the applicable facility, game or event may include terms regarding the capture and use of video or audiovisual recordings and you should familiarize yourself with those terms. Furthermore, at certain games or events operated by MLB, an MLB Club, an MiLB Club, or any MLB Entity, consent may be separately sought for the capture and use of video or audiovisual content for purposes set forth in that consent. This video or audiovisual content may be utilized by MLB, an MLB Club, an MiLB Club, or an MLB Entity pursuant to this Privacy Policy to produce, exhibit, advertise or otherwise use your image, voice or likeness in any and all media now or existing in future as part of the MLB Entities' commercial, advertising and marketing activities. It may also be used to provide security services, to train personnel regarding security practices and in connection with legal action or regulatory investigation. You may also elect to provide us with Submitted Content (as defined in the Terms of Use), and consent to their use for marketing, promotional or other purposes, and otherwise pursuant to this Privacy Policy, on certain applicable MLB Properties and/or via applicable Social Networks.

Our Access to Your Contacts. When you use our Games, we may solicit your permission to access your contacts list (e.g., address book) so you can be matched with individuals from your contacts list who participate in our Games and you can invite your friends to play. We will not store the information in your contacts list except to manage your Game invitations.
